nasb.text: And He *said to them, “Draw some out now and take it to the headwaiter.” So they took it to him.

esv.text: And he said to them, “Now draw some out and take it to the master of the feast.” So they took it.

cnv.text: 耶穌又吩咐他們：“現在舀出來，送給筵席的總管！”他們就送去了。

ccb.text: 耶稣又说：“现在可以舀些出来，送给宴席总管。”他们就送了去。

csbs.text: 耶稣又对他们说：“现在舀出来，送去给管宴席的。”他们就送去了。
